label: CCR OAuth Proxy
description: Managed Claude Code Router backend for Architect Mode setups that keep claude-* calls on Claude Code OAuth/session auth and route non-Claude worker aliases through CCR

tui.headline: CCR OAuth Architect Proxy
features: Managed CCR runs setup-local, like the CC Router provider
Architect model proxy starts automatically for this setup
claude-* planner requests use the normal Claude Code OAuth/session login
Non-Claude worker aliases route through the CCR backend
tui.setupNote: Use this when you want Architect Mode with Claude Code account auth for planner/claude-* calls and CCR for worker aliases. On the Models step, set Opus to a claude-* model and set worker aliases to names your CCR config can route.
